# SecCredentialType.default

**Case**

The default setting for determining whether to present UI is used.

## Declaration

```swift
case `default`
```

## Discussion

The default setting can be changed with a call to [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainSetUserInteractionAllowed(_:)].
title: SecCredentialType.default
